column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: The roller-coaster ride of a season was arguably one of the New Orleans Saints best yet. With the combination of a dominating defense and a potent running attack, the Saints  hopes of post-season play stayed alive until the closing seconds of the last game.With an 8-7 record going into the final game of the season at the Superdome against the Los Angeles Rams, the Saints had a chance to finish with their first winning season ever while earning a playoff berth. However, Rams kicker Mike Lansford kicked a 42-yard Field Goal with :06 left to defeat the Saints 26-24, and advance to the playoffs.
